calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-07-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth C. Throne, Esq. of Supple & Canvel LLP, Tel. 415.366.5533, for Defendant and moving party;
J. Philip Martin, Esq. of Kastner Kim LLP, Tel. 650.967.7854, for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative with modification: DEFENDANT ON CALL INTERNATIONAL INSURANCE AGENCY LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with 30 days leave to amend as to the third, fourth and fifth causes of action and sustained without leave to amend as to the sixth cause of action. Plaintiff to submit an order to the court by email. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
